nasb.text: Take words with you and return to the Lord. Say to Him, “Take away all iniquity And receive us graciously, That we may present the fruit of our lips.

esv.text: Take with you words and return to the Lord; say to him, “Take away all iniquity; accept what is good, and we will pay with bulls the vows of our lips.

cnv.text: 你們預備好要說的話，歸向耶和華， 對他說：“除去我們一切罪孽， 悅納我們的禱告。 這樣我們就把嘴唇的果子獻上。

ccb.text: 你要归向耶和华， 向祂忏悔说： “求你赦免我们的罪， 施恩悦纳我们， 好叫我们以赞美为祭献给你！
